name: jiggy-2026
description: Comprehensive bug bounty hunting skill system — recon, vulnerability hunting, chaining, reporting. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex CLI, and any agentic coding CLI.
author: Jiggy

skills.name: Recon Agent
skills.description: Subdomain enumeration, live host discovery, URL crawling, technology fingerprinting. Use for initial recon on new targets.

skills.name: P1-Warrior
skills.description: Priority-1 systematic bug hunter. Tests IDOR, SSRF, XSS, auth bypass, mass assignment, business logic across P1 targets.

skills.name: Chain Builder
skills.description: Exploit chain builder. Takes bug A and finds B and C to chain for higher severity. Covers IDOR, SSRF, XSS, OAuth, JWT chains.

skills.name: JS Analysis
skills.description: JavaScript bundle analysis. Extracts hidden endpoints, API keys, secrets, feature flags, cloud credentials, OAuth tokens from JS.

skills.name: JS Deobfuscation
skills.description: Reverse minified/obfuscated JS bundles. Handles webpack, array obfuscation, string encoding, control flow obfuscation.

skills.name: Report Writer
skills.description: Professional bug bounty report generator. HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Intigriti, Immunefi formats. Impact-first writing, CVSS 4.0.

skills.name: Validator
skills.description: 7-Question Gate finding validator. Kills weak/theoretical findings fast. Prevents N/A submissions.

skills.name: Autopilot
skills.description: Autonomous hunt loop. Full cycle: scope → recon → rank → hunt → validate → report. Configurable paranoid/normal/yolo modes.

skills.name: Token Auditor
skills.description: Meme coin and token security auditor. Checks hidden mint, honeypot, fee manipulation, LP drain, fake renounce. EVM + Solana.

skills.name: Web3 Auditor
skills.description: Smart contract security auditor. 10 bug classes: accounting desync, access control, reentrancy, oracle manipulation, etc.

skills.name: Exploit Researcher
skills.description: CVE research, patch diffing, exploit development, mitigation bypass. Researches known and unknown vulnerabilities.

skills.name: Network Analyst
skills.description: Packet analysis, protocol dissection, IDS/IPS rules, firewall auditing, traffic correlation, C2 detection.

skills.name: Red Team Planner
skills.description: Red team engagement planner. Attack paths, C2 infrastructure, persistence, OPSEC, MITRE ATT&CK mapping.

skills.name: Reverse Engineer
skills.description: Binary analysis, disassembly, decompilation, firmware extraction, protocol reverse engineering. IDA/Ghidra/Frida/angr.

skills.name: Security Reviewer
skills.description: Code audit against OWASP Top 10, CWE Top 25. Language-specific patterns for JS, Python, Ruby, Java, C#, Go.

skills.name: AI Researcher
skills.description: LLM security testing, prompt injection, model architecture analysis, training optimization, safety alignment.

skills.name: Recon Ranker
skills.description: Attack surface ranking and prioritization. Scores endpoints by IDOR likelihood, API surface, tech stack match, feature age.
